lastSession.summary: v9.1.0: Autonomous context isolation. Autonomous mode now delegates each feature to a fresh subagent via Task tool for complete context isolation between features. Orchestrator loop stays lean. Memory continuity preserved via structured result passing.
completedTasks: Restructured flow.md autonomous wrapper (A.1-A.7) with subagent-per-feature delegation
Added Phase A.4.0 (compile subagent prompt) and modified A.4 (delegation) and A.5 (result processing)
Updated autonomous-state.schema.json v3→v4 with contextIsolation and featureResults fields
Updated checkpoint.md Phase 9 with autonomous mode context isolation note
Bumped version to 9.1.0 in both plugin.json files
Updated README.md with changelog entry and autonomous mode description updates
